items.title: P1 BE pre-game countdown 5s (server-authoritative)
items.body:
Repo target: server
Base branch: dev
Task branch required: yes
Branch: codex/dev-pregame-countdown-be
PR target: dev
Scope: tressette:game-start-countdown (5..0), play-card lock during countdown with dedicated contract error, in_game only after countdown end, api-contract + chain/start tests.

items.title: P1 FE pre-game overlay countdown + input lock
items.body:
Repo target: app
Base branch: dev
Task branch required: yes
Branch: codex/dev-pregame-countdown-fe
PR target: dev
Scope: overlay pre-game countdown, darkened background, interaction lock during countdown, no regressions on turn/timer/reveal trick/scoreboard/data mode.
